description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From TV streaming help content, find and save the most recently updated article about 4K streaming requirements and internet speed.

target_names: 4K streaming requirements and recommended internet speed

tasks.name: From TV streaming help content, find and save the most recently updated article about 4K streaming requirements and internet speed.
tasks.description: From TV streaming help content, find and save the most recently updated article about 4K streaming requirements and internet speed.

tasks.instruction: From the smart TV streaming issues help section, open an article that helps fix buffering or low video quality on smart TVs and use its contact option to submit a streaming quality support request describing that buffering happens every evening around 8 PM.

target_names: Buffering or poor video quality on smart TVs

expected_values.subject: Frequent buffering on my smart TV

tasks.name: From the smart TV streaming issues help section, open an article that helps fix buffering or low video quality on smart TVs and use its contact option to submit a streaming quality support request describing that buffering happens every evening around 8 PM.
tasks.description: From the smart TV streaming issues help section, open an article that helps fix buffering or low video quality on smart TVs and use its contact option to submit a streaming quality support request describing that buffering happens every evening around 8 PM.

tasks.instruction: In the account cancellation help section, compare the web browser and TV app cancellation articles by counting the numbered steps in their main instructions, then mark as helpful the article that has fewer steps.

target_names: Cancel your subscription on a web browser
Cancel your subscription on your TV app

tasks.name: In the account cancellation help section, compare the web browser and TV app cancellation articles by counting the numbered steps in their main instructions, then mark as helpful the article that has fewer steps.
tasks.description: In the account cancellation help section, compare the web browser and TV app cancellation articles by counting the numbered steps in their main instructions, then mark as helpful the article that has fewer steps.

tasks.instruction: In the Android devices help section, open the highest-rated article about changing subtitles or audio language, save it, and then switch its article language to Spanish.

target_names: Change subtitles or audio language on Android

tasks.name: In the Android devices help section, open the highest-rated article about changing subtitles or audio language, save it, and then switch its article language to Spanish.
tasks.description: In the Android devices help section, open the highest-rated article about changing subtitles or audio language, save it, and then switch its article language to Spanish.

tasks.instruction: In the parental controls help section, find and save an article about setting maturity ratings appropriate for a teen (around age 13), then open a related article about creating a PIN to protect parental control settings.

target_names: Set parental controls by maturity rating
Set a PIN to restrict changes
Set a PIN to restrict changes to profiles and parental controls

tasks.name: In the parental controls help section, find and save an article about setting maturity ratings appropriate for a teen (around age 13), then open a related article about creating a PIN to protect parental control settings.
tasks.description: In the parental controls help section, find and save an article about setting maturity ratings appropriate for a teen (around age 13), then open a related article about creating a PIN to protect parental control settings.

tasks.instruction: In the payment methods help section, use an article about updating your card to open payment settings, change the billing country to United States, and then return to the Help Center.

target_names: Update the card used for your subscription

tasks.name: In the payment methods help section, use an article about updating your card to open payment settings, change the billing country to United States, and then return to the Help Center.
tasks.description: In the payment methods help section, use an article about updating your card to open payment settings, change the billing country to United States, and then return to the Help Center.

tasks.instruction: Using downloads help content and plan filters, open an article that explains how many devices can download on the Standard plan and a related article comparing download limits across plans, and save both articles.

target_names: How many devices can download videos on my plan?
See download limits for other plans
See download limits for other plans

tasks.name: Using downloads help content and plan filters, open an article that explains how many devices can download on the Standard plan and a related article comparing download limits across plans, and save both articles.
tasks.description: Using downloads help content and plan filters, open an article that explains how many devices can download on the Standard plan and a related article comparing download limits across plans, and save both articles.

tasks.instruction: In the computer streaming issues help section, open the article for error code VC_201 and start a support chat (or whichever contact option is fastest) making sure the error code VC_201 is included in the contact form.
